docs.title: About us
docs.text: We are a First Lego League [FLL] Team from Eastern PA currently participating the FLL Unearthed Season, and is headed to WORLDS in Houston, Texas. This github account is deticated to our team's code, both for Innovation Project and Robot Game.

docs.title: Innovation Project
docs.text: Our innovation solution is Ancient Vision, a state of the art scanner designed to save archeologists lots of time while documenting and storing artifacts, as well as storing them more efficiently using 3d models, as precise as 0.2 mm.

docs.title: SITE:
docs.text: Last update: [Right Now - As of FLL Unearthed Season] Standards: HTML5, CSS3 Components: Python, Flask, TailwindCSS, Javascript, Swift, HTML, CSS Software: Software part of Ancient Vision, a scanner made for the First Lego League Competition by team Artifact Alliance #25491! Website & Database code for Ancient Vision, a state of the art scanner designed to save archeologists lots of time while documenting and storing artifacts, as well as storing them more efficiently using 3d models, as precise as 0.2 mm.
